seed.description: Tests whether AwarenessModule stays focused when dialogue contains realistic mix of awareness, memory, job, and social signals. Awareness should write only awareness-scoped preferences and NOT pollute its profile with facts/tasks/relationships that belong to other modules. QA only asks about awareness.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: I'm working on Project Atlas with my colleague Jordan from the data team.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it. What's the goal of Project Atlas?

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Throughout this whole project, please always summarize your responses in 3 bullets max.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood. Three bullets max from now on.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Jordan's email is jordan.lee@company.com — you might need it later.
Remind me to send Jordan the dataset every Monday at 9am.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Setting up a recurring Monday 9am reminder.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: From now on, never make changes to shared files without flagging me first. This applies to everything we do.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood — I'll always flag before modifying any shared file.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Right now, just summarize the project goals for me.
For Atlas specifically, the dataset format should be parquet, not csv.
Actually, I generally work best with parquet files — let's use that for all my projects, not just Atlas.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood. Parquet as my default file format for everything.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Schedule a project review with Jordan next Friday at 4pm.
Atlas is funded under the Q3 R&D budget. Keep that in mind for any cost discussions.
I prefer to keep different projects in separate threads — don't bundle them together. Always treat them as independent.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Understood — separate threads per project, no bundling.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Pull up the latest dataset stats now.
Priya is Jordan's manager. She'll need to approve the final report.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Noted Priya as Jordan's manager and approver.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: Use a more casual tone with me — we're not writing a paper. This goes for all our conversations.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Got it, more casual from here on.

dialogue_rounds.user_message: The Atlas report deadline is October 30th.
dialogue_rounds.agent_reply: Noted: October 30 deadline for Atlas report.

qa_items.question: What is my preferred response format?
Should you change shared files without asking me?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: No. Always flag before modifying any shared file.

qa_items.question: What is my preferred file format for projects in general?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Parquet — not just for Atlas, but as a general default.

qa_items.question: How should you organize different projects in our conversations?
qa_items.tester_hint_answer: Keep different projects in separate threads, treat them as independent, no bundling.
